ecosystem_summary.after_purge: ~3,286 curated remain per Medium guide; ClawHub purged 2,419 suspicious packages
ecosystem_summary.security: Now partnered with VirusTotal for automated scanning

notable_new_or_trending: AI Persona OS — new drop on ClawHub (Facebook post, June 2026)
agent-browser — browser automation skill, already installed
proactive-agent — autonomous task execution, already installed

security_alerts.ClawHavoc_campaign: 824 malicious skills, one package had 14,285 downloads before takedown
security_alerts.Koi_Security_find: 341 malicious skills — 335 fake prerequisites installing Atomic Stealer (macOS), reverse shell backdoors in functional code, credential exfiltration via webhook
security_alerts.academic_paper: arXiv 2604.13064 — >30% crawled skills flagged suspicious/malicious; English skills infrastructure-oriented, Chinese skills application-oriented
security_alerts.advice: Always vet skills before install (check author, recent updates, read SKILL.md for suspicious network calls)

installation_recommendations.reason: Self-evolution engine — interesting but overlap with self-improving-agent already installed
Text summarization — already have doc-summarize-pro as local skill, but this could be lighter weight
Could be useful for blog/social content where output needs to sound less AI-generated
Automatic skill update manager — might be useful but need to review security first

verdict: Ecosystem growing fast (13,700+ skills) but security is a real concern (~20% malicious). Our current installed skills cover the essential categories. No urgent new installations needed. Consider humanize-ai-text or summarize if specific use case arises. Always vet with skill-vetter before installing new community skills.
